title: Privilege escalation through weak admin hygiene
scenario: A threat actor reuses exposed credentials and reaches an overprivileged admin account.
existing_controls: MFA enabled for some admins, quarterly access reviews
notes: High-value risk because admin compromise increases blast radius across the environment.

title: Endpoint encryption by commodity ransomware
scenario: Phishing leads to execution of ransomware on staff endpoints during term time.
existing_controls: Defender, mail filtering, endpoint isolation runbook
notes: Residual score remains high because the teaching calendar limits downtime tolerance.

title: Backups unavailable during recovery
scenario: Backups are present but restoration tests are incomplete and recovery sequencing is unclear.
existing_controls: Daily backup jobs, immutable copy for selected workloads
notes: The main weakness is confidence in restoration and recovery time.

title: Sensitive student data exposed during incident handling
scenario: Emergency file-sharing during a ransomware event bypasses normal data handling controls.
existing_controls: Sensitivity labels, retention guidance, limited emergency contacts
notes: Accepted temporarily until the incident collaboration process is rewritten.
